overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along an urban highway shoulder. The player moves from a covered section under an overpass through open highway with futuristic skyscrapers in the distance, eventually turning onto a curved ramp revealing an industrial district. The scene features moderate traffic, clear weather, and warm afternoon lighting with strong shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass with digital signage and concrete pillars

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the highway shoulder beneath the overpass structure

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure with green glass noise barriers casting shadows below
massive concrete pillar with graffiti markings supporting the overpass
illuminated digital display showing the number 11 and WNS text
signage indicating the Little China district visible in the distance
metal guardrail running along the right side of the highway shoulder
large commercial billboard with colorful advertisements on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic urban setting. The camera moves forward along the shoulder, passing concrete pillars with graffiti on the right and large digital billboards on the left. The lighting is mixed, with bright sunlight visible beyond the overpass shadow. Moderate traffic flows on the highway to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway transition zone from covered underpass to open road

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass into direct bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the highway shoulder as the environment opens up

entered.detail: metal framework supporting highway direction signs spanning across the road
tall modern glass and steel towers visible in the distance ahead
contemporary high-rise structures with reflective glass facades

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from under the overpass into brighter sunlight, transitioning from the sheltered underpass to the open highway. The concrete pillars recede to the right as futuristic skyscrapers become visible in the distance. The lighting shifts dramatically from shadow to bright natural daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open multi-lane urban highway with downtown skyline views

agents.ego_description: walking straight along the highway shoulder toward the distant city center

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking and moving ahead on the highway

entered.detail: highway signage indicating directions to Watson district mounted on overhead gantry

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the open highway with full sky visibility and bright sunlight. Futuristic skyscrapers dominate the horizon ahead, growing larger as the camera approaches. Various vehicles pass by on the left, including a notable red sports car. Highway signs for Watson become visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved elevated highway ramp with industrial district overlook

events.description: turning right onto a curved highway ramp, changing direction from straight to curved path

agents.ego_description: navigating a right-hand curve on the highway ramp, revealing the industrial district

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke visible in the distance
elevated highway ramp curving to the right with concrete barriers
tall green translucent noise dampening panels along the right side
large industrial complex structures with utilitarian architecture

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a curved highway ramp, fundamentally changing the view from the downtown skyline to an industrial district. The guardrail switches from the right to the left side as the road curves. Industrial smokestacks and utilitarian buildings replace the glass skyscrapers, while the camera passes under another elevated highway structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadowed depths of an urban overpass into a sun-drenched highway corridor that eventually curves toward an industrial district. It begins by moving along a shoulder beneath a massive elevated highway, passing graffiti-covered pillars and digital billboards while moderate traffic flows nearby. As the camera emerges from the shelter of the overpass, the lighting shifts dramatically from deep shadow to bright natural daylight, revealing a distant horizon of futuristic skyscrapers. The scene then expands across the open highway under a clear sky, passing overhead signs for Watson and a red sports car before the camera turns right onto a curved ramp. This final turn shifts the perspective away from the downtown skyline toward a landscape of industrial smokestacks and utilitarian buildings as the camera passes under another elevated structure.
